productDisplayName: Nike Men As 7 Sw Temp Grey Shorts
description: CompositionGrey shorts made of 86% polyester and 14% spandex, has an elastic waist with interior drawcord and a mesh side panel Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Scorers and defenders alike require maximum range of motion to lead their teams to victory, and they'll get plenty of it in these nike shorts. With sweat-wicking fabric and strategic ventilation, these shorts keep them focused on the big win.
